quote: The first and greatest victory is to conquer yourself.
author: Plato

quote: Do not pray for an easy life, pray for the strength to endure a difficult one.
author: Bruce Lee

quote: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: He who cannot obey himself will be commanded.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quote: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek.
author: Joseph Campbell

quote: Hard times create strong men, strong men create good times.
author: G. Michael Hopf

quote: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
author: Marcus Aurelius

quote: Man is not made for defeat. A man can be destroyed but not defeated.
author: Ernest Hemingway

quote: I don't count my sit-ups. I only start counting when it starts hurting.
author: Muhammad Ali

quote: The strength of a man is not in the weight he can lift, but in the burdens he chooses to carry.
author: Unknown

quote: Your worst enemy cannot harm you as much as your own unguarded thoughts.
author: Buddha

quote: Temptation is the feeling God uses to test our faith and resolve.
author: Unknown

quote: Whoever does not have a share in patience will not achieve anything.
author: Ibn Taymiyyah

quote: The greatest form of jihad is to battle your own soul.
author: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)

quote: Be patient. Allah does not let the reward of those who do good go to waste.
author: Quran 11:115

quote: Indeed, after hardship comes ease.
author: Quran 94:5

quote: Do not lose hope, nor be sad. You will surely be victorious if you are true believers.
author: Quran 3:139

quote: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: We must all suffer one of two pains: the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: What you do every day matters more than what you do once in a while.
author: Gretchen Rubin

quote: Success is nothing more than a few simple disciplines practiced every day.
author: Jim Rohn

quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
author: Mark Twain

quote: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
author: Confucius

quote: The real man smiles in trouble, gathers strength from distress, and grows brave by reflection.
author: Thomas Paine

quote: Courage is not the absence of fear. It is acting in spite of it.
author: Mark Twain

quote: Anyone who has never made a mistake has never tried anything new.
author: Albert Einstein

quote: To conquer oneself is the greatest victory of all.
author: Plato

quote: Guard your eyes, for they are the window to your heart.
author: Unknown

quote: Lowering the gaze protects the heart from evil.
author: Ibn Al-Qayyim

quote: He who guards his gaze will find sweetness in his heart.
author: Ibn Al-Qayyim

quote: Self-control is the chief element in self-respect and self-respect is the chief element in courage.
author: Thucydides

quote: A man who masters himself can conquer the world.
author: Unknown

quote: The one who conquers his desires is greater than the one who conquers a city.
author: Proverb

quote: Every moment of resistance to temptation is a victory.
author: Frederick William Faber
